x-enumeration-literals.name: Borrower
x-enumeration-literals.description: The individual or organization receiving the loan under the credit plan.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Lender
x-enumeration-literals.description: The institution providing the credit, enforcing rules, and managing repayments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Guarantor
x-enumeration-literals.description: Additional party guaranteeing repayment or sharing liability.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Officer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Bank staff responsible for approving and managing the loan.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Compliance Officer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ensures the credit plan is applied in accordance with bank policies and regulatory requirements.
